positive: A majestic, stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) with flowing, iridescent tails and mystical fox-fire markings, rendered in a clean, high-contrast silhouette style. The fox is positioned centrally, looking directly at the viewer, surrounded by swirling patterns of cosmic nebulae, stylized crescent moons, and abstract constellations. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and ethereal gold as the primary color palette. The composition should be suitable for a seamless, repeating apparel print, featuring strong linework and negative space. Intricate tattoo flash aesthetic, vector illustration, symmetrical composition, minimalist cosmic art, volumetric lighting, sharp focus, UHD, printable quality.
